substitution_note: spec 07 §4.3: the candidate pool is meant to come from the stage-1 DRM screen re-run against the updated network (gate 1). Until spec 01 lands, the candidate universe is HAND-SUPPLIED -- the 13-arterial HANDOFF shortlist is the natural seed. This N1b run supplies the TWO corridors that already have committed configs + derived files [harbor, streetcar], which is exactly the point: 2 candidates -> 2 singles + 2 directional pairs + trivial swaps at full N=40,000 CRN, small enough to prove the sequencing machinery end to end. More candidates arrive with stage 1. This substitution is surfaced in the primary artifact (network_sequence.json.candidate_universe.hand_supplied).

candidates.note: Harbor Blvd (Fullerton -> Santa Ana), corridor route 543; the measured-anchor ALM headline corridor.

OC Streetcar (SARTC -> Harbor/Westminster); explicit PE-ROW waypoint alignment whose WESTERN TERMINUS sits on Harbor Blvd -- the real-geometry crossing the G3 complementarity gate exercises against a Harbor commitment.
